name: EPIC Dashboard Plugin — Full AI Suite

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ panels: [{ id: 'risk-score', label: 'Risk Score', title: 'Sepsis Risk Score', description: 'Vitals-based sepsis screening — latest readings only', webhook: 'risk-score-run', trigger: 'auto' }, { id: 'care-gaps', label: 'Care Gaps', title: 'Care Gap Analysis', description: 'Preventive care items the patient may be overdue for', webhook: 'care-gaps-run', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Check Care Gaps' }, { id: 'discharge-summary', label: 'Discharge Summary', title: 'AI Discharge Summary', description: 'AI-generated discharge summary from patient record', webhook: 'discharge-summary', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Generate Summary' }, { id: 'previsit-summary', label: 'Pre-Visit Summary', title: 'AI Pre-Visit Brief', description: 'AI-generated pre-visit briefing for providers', webhook: 'previsit-summary', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Generate Brief' }] }) }}

parameters.text: ={{ 'Generate a discharge summary from the following FHIR patient data:\n\n' + $json.context }}

options.systemMessage: You are a clinical documentation specialist. Write a professional hospital discharge summary in clear clinical language. Structure the summary with these clearly labeled sections: REASON FOR ADMISSION, HOSPITAL COURSE, SIGNIFICANT FINDINGS (vitals and labs), DISCHARGE MEDICATIONS, ALLERGIES, FOLLOW-UP INSTRUCTIONS, and DISCHARGE CONDITION. Be concise and clinically accurate. Do not invent information not present in the data.

values.content:
{{
'Create a structured pre-visit summary using ONLY the patient context below.

' +
'PATIENT CONTEXT:
' +
$json.context +
'

' +
'Return the answer in exactly this format:

' +
'**PATIENT SNAPSHOT:**
' +
'- Name:
' +
'- Age:
' +
'- Gender:
' +
'- Key Demographics:

' +
'**REASON FOR VISIT:**
' +
'- 

' +
'**ACTIVE PROBLEMS:**
' +
'1.
' +
'2.

' +
'**CURRENT MEDICATIONS:**
' +
'- 

' +
'**ALLERGIES:**
' +
'- 

' +
'**RECENT VITALS SUMMARY:**
' +
'- 

' +
'**RECENT LAB HIGHLIGHTS:**
' +
'- 

' +
'**IMMUNIZATION STATUS:**
' +
'- 

' +
'**RECOMMENDED DISCUSSION POINTS:**
' +
'1.
' +
'2.
' +
'3.
' +
'4.
' +
'5.'
}}
